ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the instrument's market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the instrument data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of transactions for the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the data point */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the data point */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regression_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the model is for */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of regression model (e.g., linear, logistic) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model (e.g., coefficients, intercept) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_models_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric is for */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  "coefficient_of_determination" REAL /* Coefficient of determination (R-squared) of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were calculated */,
  "training_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the training period */,
  "training_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the training period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data is for */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data from the external source */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the external data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_article_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the post is related to */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the post */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES social_media_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the behavior is for */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the instrument (e.g., stable, trending) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the behavior */,
  "behavior_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the behavior */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the behavior information (e.g., model, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_behavior_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regression_model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version is for */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model (e.g., coefficients, intercept) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the metric is for */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the version */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the version */,
  "coefficient_of_determination" REAL /* Coefficient of determination (R-squared) of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were calculated */,
  "training_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the training period */,
  "training_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the training period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES regression_model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_fetched" TEXT /* Last time the data was fetched from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_article_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the news source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social media source */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
